name: osint-recon
description: OSINT investigation across hundreds of public sites by username or email. A browser-first workflow verifies accounts and captures court-ready screenshot evidence in a self-contained HTML report. Includes self-healing detection, an optional infostealer-leak check, a combined recon workflow, an ADS-B Exchange flight-tracking analyst with aircraft history and KML export, and a Bitcoin crypto-trace engine for wallet attribution, forward tracing, and mixer detection.
